name: Boris Hulwich
excerpt: Boris Hulwich is a weathered wanderer shaped by loss and exile.
notes: Boris Hulwich, once the son of a minor noble house on the fringes of Veldmoor, lost his family during a brutal border conflict that erased his lineage from official record. Stripped of title and inheritance, he became a wanderer—part mercenary, part reluctant guardian—moving through the marshlands and ruined keeps of the region. Known for his imposing build, ash-gray eyes, and calm voice, Boris carries himself with restraint, hiding a constant tension between vengeance and hope. His primary motive is survival with purpose, often drawn into conflicts due to a moral code he cannot escape. His closest bond is with Sable Voss, characterized by mutual reliance and a complex dynamic.
context_summary: - Boris Hulwich is a weathered wanderer.
- He lost his family during a border conflict.
- His lineage was erased from official records.
- He was stripped of title and inheritance.
- He became part mercenary and part guardian.
- He moves through marshlands and ruined keeps.

- He carries a calm voice and restraint.

- His primary motive is survival with purpose.

- His closest bond is with Sable Voss.
